ddls:
CREATE TABLE "weather_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data entry */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the state where the data was collected */,
  "district_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the district where the data was collected */,
  "lat" REAL /* Latitude of the data collection location */,
  "long" REAL /* Longitude of the data collection location */,
  "year_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the year the data was collected */,
  "month_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the month the data was collected */,
  "collection_method" TEXT /* Method used to collect the data */,
  "collection_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of data collection */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version of the data entry */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the data entry was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the data entry was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weather_data_district_id FOREIGN KEY ("district_id") REFERENCES districts ("district_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weather_data_year_id FOREIGN KEY ("year_id") REFERENCES years ("year_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weather_data_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weather_data_month_id FOREIGN KEY ("month_id") REFERENCES months ("month_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "weather_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weather type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the weather type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the weather type */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the weather type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "weather_data_values" (
  "value_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each measured value */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the data entry the value belongs to */,
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the weather type of the value */,
  "value" REAL /* Measured value */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the value was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the value was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("value_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weather_data_values_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES weather_data ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weather_data_values_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("type_id") REFERENCES weather_types ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "states" (
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each state */,
  "state_name" TEXT /* Name of the state */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the state */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "districts" (
  "district_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each district */,
  "district_name" TEXT /* Name of the district */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the state where the district is located */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the district */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("district_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_districts_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "collection_methods" (
  "method_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each collection method */,
  "method_name" TEXT /* Name of the collection method */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the collection method */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("method_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "collection_frequencies" (
  "frequency_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each collection frequency */,
  "frequency_name" TEXT /* Name of the collection frequency */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the collection frequency */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("frequency_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "years" (
  "year_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each year */,
  "year_name" TEXT /* Year the data was collected */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("year_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "months" (
  "month_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each month */,
  "month_name" TEXT /* Name of the month */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("month_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role FOREIGN KEY ("role") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the user role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the user role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who accessed the data */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the data entry that was accessed */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Date and time the data was accessed */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action performed on the data (e.g., view, edit, delete) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES weather_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data version */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the data entry that the version belongs to */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number of the data */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the version was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_versions_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES weather_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "version_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version history entry */,
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the data version that was changed */,
  "change_description" TEXT /* Description of the changes made to the data version */,
  "changed_at" TEXT /* Date and time the changes were made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_version_history_version_id FOREIGN KEY ("version_id") REFERENCES data_versions ("version_id")
)
